cot_prefix: Okay, let's see. There are five team members each starting in specific positions. Let me note that: - Alice: fullback - Bob: center midfielder - Claire: right midfielder - Dave: goalkeeper - Eve: left winger 2. **Second swap: Claire and Bob trade positions.** - Now, Claire becomes the center midfielder and Bob becomes the right midfielder: - Alice: fullback - Bob: right midfielder - Claire: center midfielder - Dave: goalkeeper - Eve: left winger 3. **Third swap: Alice and Bob trade positions.** - So Alice becomes the right midfielder and Bob becomes the fullback: - Alice: right midfielder - Bob: fullback - Claire: center midfielder - Dave: goalkeeper - Eve: left winger 4. **Fourth swap: Eve and Dave trade positions.** - This swaps them back to their original positions (Dave back as left winger, Eve back as goalkeeper): - Alice: right midfielder - Bob: fullback - Claire: center midfielder - Dave: left winger - Eve: goalkeeper 5. **Fifth swap: Bob and Alice trade positions.** - Alice goes back to fullback, and Bob becomes right midfielder: - Alice: fullback - Bob: right midfielder - Claire: center midfielder - Dave: left winger - Eve: goalkeeper So, after all swaps, Eve is back to goalkeeper?
